web.runtime: Web SPA on Vite dev server http://[::1]:5176
web.method: Playwright CLI page.evaluate imported WebAttachmentStore and createReadAttachmentTool in the browser runtime, wrote sample.pdf into IndexedDB, executed read_attachment({ mode: 'structured' }), then deleted the temporary vaultRef.
